_description: Step 7: Create individual Validation Checks (Genie features and CLI commands)

data.name: BGP Neighbors
data.description: Validate BGP neighbor adjacency state before and after upgrade

data.name: OSPF Neighbors
data.description: Validate OSPF neighbor adjacency and area membership

data.name: Interface Summary
data.description: Capture interface status (up/down), IP, and error counters

data.name: Routing Table
data.description: Snapshot of all IP routes for drift detection

data.name: CDP Neighbors
data.description: Capture CDP neighbor table for topology validation

data.name: Platform Resources
data.description: Check CPU and memory utilization before upgrade proceeds

data.name: Flash Filesystem
data.description: Verify available flash space before image transfer

data.name: Install Summary
data.description: Post-upgrade install summary to confirm committed packages

data.name: Stack Members
data.description: Validate all stack members are online after reload

data.name: HSRP Status
data.description: Validate HSRP state and priority post-upgrade

data.name: Spanning Tree
data.description: Capture STP root bridge and port states
